Disabled Element Not Visually Distinct Test Page

These buttons are disabled but have opacity: 0.9 — above the 0.7 threshold. They appear almost identical to enabled buttons, making it unclear to users that they cannot be clicked.

← disabled but opacity: 0.9 (nearly invisible difference)
← disabled, opacity: 0.9
← disabled, opacity: 0.9
← this one is enabled
